description.para: Register offsets for the XHwIcap device.

sectiondef.header: Device Global Interrupt Enable Register (GIER) bit definitions

description.para: This register holds the interrupt status flags for the device. These bits are toggle on write.

This register is used to enable interrupt sources for the device. Writing a '1' to a bit in this register enables the corresponding Interrupt. Writing a '0' to a bit in this register disables the corresponding Interrupt.
IPISR/IPIER registers have the same bit definitions and are only defined once.

briefdescription.para: Read from the specified HwIcap device register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XHwIcap_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

briefdescription.para: Write to the specified HwIcap device register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XHwIcap_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue);
